description: Artifact generated during the Verification Phase (Phase 4) detailing test execution plans and results.

test_case_id.description: Unique ID for the test case (e.g., TC-AUTH-001).

test_description.description: A concise summary of what this test verifies.

prerequisites.description: The state the system must be in before this test can run.

action.description: The action to perform (e.g., 'Click button X', 'Input text Y').

input_data.description: The data to use for the action.

expected_result.description: What the system MUST show/do upon successful completion of all steps.

test_data_scope.description: Definition of data needed (e.g., 'All standard user profiles').

test_status.description: The recorded outcome of the test run.

actual_result_summary.description: A brief summary of what actually happened.
